name: tessera-neural-sidecar
description: Neural trust layer for agent systems. Watches agent trajectory, compresses into sparse neural state, emits trusted/abstain decisions. Read-only sidecar — never mutates host memory, tools, or prompts.
author: James Paul Jackson
claimBoundary: The plugin provides local inference and proposals only; the host retains tool, memory-write, prompt, topology, codec, and external API authority.

tools.title: Analyze Session
tools.description: Analyze agent session trajectory for drift and anomalies

tools.title: Trust Decision
tools.description: Get trust decision (trusted/abstain) for current session

tools.title: Memory Proposals
tools.description: Propose memory candidates from session events

tools.title: Health Check
tools.description: Get plugin health and runtime status

tools.title: Status Dashboard
tools.description: Get full status dashboard with metrics and evidence

integration.install_command: AGNT dashboard → Plugins → Install from File → tessera.agnt
